title: Catamaran Rental Day in Fuengirola: Costs and Tips
html:
A catamaran rental day in Fuengirola lets you cruise the Costa del Sol from Puerto Deportivo de Fuengirola, with most full-day skippered catamarans priced from around EUR 600 to EUR 1,400. BoatHire24 connects you with verified local operators for a relaxed day on the Mediterranean.

Where to set off in Fuengirola

Fuengirola sits on the western Costa del Sol, and a catamaran day usually begins at the marina before tracing the coast toward neighbouring towns and quiet bays. Most departures leave from the protected harbour and head west.

  • Puerto Deportivo de Fuengirola: the main marina and the usual departure point for charters.
  • Castillo Sohail: the headland fortress and beach just south of the port, a popular first landmark.
  • Benalmadena and Puerto Marina: a short hop east, often passed on coastal cruises.
  • Mijas Costa and Calahonda: the rocky coves west of town, good for a swim stop.
  • Marbella: roughly 20 nautical miles west, reachable on a longer full-day itinerary.

How much does a catamaran rental day in Fuengirola cost?

A full-day skippered catamaran in Fuengirola typically costs from EUR 600 to EUR 1,400, depending on the boat size and the season. Prices rise in summer and for larger, more luxurious vessels. To lock in live rates you can hire a boat directly and pick the dates that suit your group.

  • Shared catamaran tour: from EUR 35 per person for a few hours afloat.
  • Small motorboat half-day: from EUR 250 in EUR for the boat.
  • Catamaran full-day: from EUR 600 in EUR, often including a skipper.
  • Crewed yacht full-day: from EUR 1,800 in EUR for a larger luxury vessel.

Which catamaran to rent in Fuengirola

The right boat depends on group size, budget and how much shade you want. Catamarans suit a relaxed day with families because of their stable, roomy decks. A motor yacht is a better fit if reaching distant coves quickly matters more.

  1. Sailing catamaran: best for relaxed family days, seats up to 12 guests, from EUR 600. If you want a stable double-hull deck for sunbathing, compare the Sanyati for a full day on the water.
  2. Power catamaran: best for stable cruising with shade, seats up to 10 guests, from EUR 700.
  3. Motorboat: best for quick coastal hops and coves, seats up to 8 guests, from EUR 350.
  4. Speedboat: best for watersports and fast transfers, seats up to 7 guests, from EUR 450.
  5. Motor yacht: best for comfort and longer ranges, seats up to 11 guests, from EUR 1,200.

How does booking a catamaran in Fuengirola work?

You choose a boat and date online, send a request to the operator, and confirm with a deposit before your day in Fuengirola. The listed price usually covers the boat and skipper, while fuel, food and drinks may be extra.

If you are new to chartering, the common questions about booking will clear up deposits, cancellation terms and what to bring on the day. Each operator confirms exactly what is included before you pay.

Do you need a licence to rent a catamaran in Fuengirola?

For a skippered catamaran day in Fuengirola you do not need a licence, because a qualified skipper operates the boat for you. Spain requires a recognised boating qualification only when you steer certain craft yourself, and the operator confirms the exact requirements. High season runs from June to September, when the easterly Levante wind can build through the afternoon.

Book a morning slot in July or August: the sea off Fuengirola is calmest before midday, and the easterly Levante wind tends to strengthen later in the afternoon during the high-season months.

At a glance

  • Price band: from EUR 600 to EUR 1,400 for a full-day catamaran.
  • Peak months: June to September.
  • Trip length: a full day is typically 6 to 8 hours.
  • Capacity: up to 12 guests on a day catamaran.
  • Currency: euros (EUR).

Questions about boat rental in Fuengirola

How many people fit on a day catamaran in Fuengirola?

Most day catamarans in Fuengirola carry up to 12 guests, which suits families and groups of friends. Larger vessels exist for bigger parties, and the operator confirms the maximum capacity for each boat.

What is included in a catamaran rental day?

A typical full-day catamaran rental includes the boat and a skipper for around 6 to 8 hours afloat. Fuel, food and drinks are often charged separately, so check the listing details before you confirm.

When is the best time of year for a catamaran day in Fuengirola?

The warmest, calmest conditions usually fall between June and September, the peak season on the Costa del Sol. Spring and early autumn offer pleasant weather, lighter crowds and better value.

How far can you cruise on a full-day charter?

On a full day you can comfortably cruise toward Marbella, around 20 nautical miles west, with time for swim stops. Your skipper plans a route that fits the wind and your group's preferences.

BoatHire24 is a worldwide marketplace where you can rent a boat in Fuengirola or list your own. Plan your 2026 Costa del Sol day, and if you own a catamaran, you can rent out your boat to travellers searching this coast. The marketplace lists verified boats with clear pricing.

Written by the BoatHire24 team, who book and list verified boats in Fuengirola and hundreds of destinations worldwide.
